_comment: Explicit scene beats for one seamless movie. Run with: python -m comfymovies --scene-file prompts/example_scenes.json --duration 30 --res 480p --quality. 'weight' controls each beat's share of the timeline (optional, default 1.0).

scenes.prompt: GI Joe style 1980s cartoon, wide establishing shot of an American squad crouched at the jungle edge at dawn, cel animation, bold outlines
GI Joe style 1980s cartoon, the soldiers advance under fire toward a Serpent Empire bunker, tracer rounds and smoke, dynamic action
GI Joe style 1980s cartoon, a towering serpent-emblem war mech rises and opens fire, heroes dive for cover, explosions
GI Joe style 1980s cartoon, triumphant victory shot, soldiers raising the flag as the mech falls, golden sunrise, proud freeze-frame
